economic_notes: Nation holds equity interests in numerous commercial enterprises including hydroelectric projects (Energie Hydroelectrique Ouiatchouan S.E.C. 45%, Energie Hydroelectrique Mistassini S.E.C. 45%), wind energy (Societe en commandite Apuiat 12.5%), forestry (Shipiss inc. 100%), gaming (Jeux Piekuakami Metueu inc. 100%), and various energy and development partnerships. Undistributed net earnings from commercial enterprises and partnerships totalled $8,512,600.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED (Opinion avec reserve) due to non-compliance with SP 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations - the Nation did not identify or evaluate ARO liabilities as required from April 1, 2022. Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023. The statements are combined (etats combines) and include numerous GBEs accounted for under the modified equity method including 21 commercial enterprises and partnerships. Deferred revenue includes Revenus differes $12,394,226 + Revenus differes Entente MSAC 2023-2024 $9,368,643 + Revenus differes programmes Habitation $2,894,041 = $24,656,910 total; long-term debt includes Art.95 housing debt $915,428 + regular LTD $55,517,576. Prior year accumulated surplus was $172,216,504. Revenue lines detail not broken out in the extracted text beyond total revenues. isc_funding is the SAC receivable balance only; total government transfers could not be fully determined from available data. OSR could not be calculated without full revenue breakdown.
